title: teucrium canadense subsp. viscidum
intro: Teucrium canadense subsp. viscidum, also known as American germander, is a subspecies of the American germander plant, which is a perennial herb native to North America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of American germander include its potential to reduce stress, improve cognitive function, and support digestive health, among other benefits. American germander can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also sometimes used in herbal supplements and salves.
